user_query: I'm a music producer and I'm looking for new talents to work with. Can you help me find artists who have upcoming events and are featured on the top trending songs powered by Twitter? Also, provide me with the basic user information and tracks of the artist who sang the number one song on the Hot R&B/Hip-Hop Songs chart.

TaskList.description: Fetch the list of trending songs on Twitter.
Identify the artists associated with the trending songs and check for their upcoming events.
Query for the number one song on the Hot R&B/Hip-Hop Songs chart and retrieve the artist details.
Gather basic user information and track details for the artist from step 3.
